narrative:
Taylor Creek (precinct in Hardin County) has 391 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 46.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 37.1 percentage points.
